vocab.example: Major football tournaments always manage to draw in massive crowds of enthusiastic supporters.

vocab.meaning: tập hợp lại để ủng hộ (ai đó/đội nào đó)
vocab.example: When the national team plays, the entire country seems to rally around them in a show of unity.
Basketball has really started to catch on among the youth in recent years due to international influence.
Team sports are great because they often bring out the competitive spirit in even the quietest individuals.

vocab.meaning: cùng nhau nỗ lực, đoàn kết làm việc
vocab.example: In our culture, we value how players pull together to overcome a stronger opponent.
Thousands of fans flocked to the stadium just to cheer on their favorite local club.

vocab.meaning: đạt tới tiêu chuẩn/kỳ vọng của ai đó
vocab.example: Young athletes often feel pressured to measure up to the legends who came before them.

vocab.meaning: giành được (giải thưởng/chiến thắng) một cách thuyết phục
vocab.example: The underdogs managed to carry off the trophy, which was a huge surprise to the entire nation.
The popularity of volleyball in my country stems from its long history in the school curriculum.
Many children look up to professional athletes as role models for hard work and discipline.
